Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Jon Chapman. Author, maintainer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Chapman J (2026). rsgl: An R Implementation of the SGL Graphics Language. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://sgl-projects.github.io/rsgl/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {rsgl: An {R} Implementation of the {SGL} Graphics Language},
  author = {Jon Chapman},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},
  url = {https://sgl-projects.github.io/rsgl/},
}

@Misc{,
  title = {{SGL}: A Structured Graphics Language},
  author = {Jon Chapman},
